step_by_step_thinking:
The probability of a test detecting a truly positive person from the population of diseased refers to the test's ability to identify those who genuinely have the disease among those who indeed carry it. This aligns directly with the definition given for sensitivity — the proportion of true positives out of all patients with a condition.
\boxed{C} Based on the definitions presented and the context provided, this statement matches exactly with the concept of sensitivity rather than specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), or likelihood ratios.
